name: Fuller Metric Parts
message: Fuller Fasteners has been operating since 1976, providing an extensive inventory of metric and inch fasteners in Surrey, BC, Mississauga, ON, and Shanghai warehouses. We are ready to upload more than 8 GB of essential corporate documents such as: HR documents, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, internal corporate correspondences, etc.
